name: Chicken Soufflé
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the soup in a double boiler until ready to use while separating the eggs.
2. Beat the egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Remove the soup pot and add the egg yolks, stirring well. Add the shredded chicken and allow to cool slightly.
4. Beat 5 egg whites until very stiff.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Carefully turn the batter into a well-buttered souffle dish.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
